specs.materials: Single-piece rotationally moulded polyethylene with no joints; antibacterial; water-resistant
finishes_available: Ryno OceanGreen variant: 50% recycled fishing nets/gear
key_features: Single-piece moulded construction (no joints, cannot be weaponized)
Designed for mental-health and prison environments
Reduced ligature design (no doors/drawers on most pieces)
Range: chairs, rockers, loveseats, club chairs, tub chairs; tables (dining/activity/coffee/games); bedroom furniture (beds, nightstands, desks, storage); restraint beds
specs.notes: Specialty mental-health/prison furniture — context-specific institutional buyer (BBI's hospital/correctional segment)
